characters.appearance: Young adult, slim build, fair complexion, blonde hair with bangs. Distinguishing marks: tattoos on her left arm.
characters.wardrobe: White short-sleeve crop top, light blue jeans, silver cross necklace.
Beige and brown patterned hijab and matching traditional dress (salwar kameez).
characters.demeanor: Initially hesitant, then confident, happy, and engaged.

characters.appearance: White, humanoid robot with a smooth metallic face, blue eyes, and a glowing blue circular core on its chest.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English weak hone ki wajah se aapko kya problems aati thi? [What problems did you face because your English was weak?]
Character B says: Sab kuch. Main akele bank nahi ja pati thi. Bachhon ki PTM mein teacher se baat nahi kar pati thi. Har cheez ke liye husband ko bolna padta tha. [Everything. I couldn't go to the bank alone. I couldn't talk to the teacher at my kids' PTM. I had to ask my husband for everything.]
Character A says: Toh phir kya badla? [So what changed?]
Character B says: Meri bhabhi ne mujhe Supernova app dikhaya. Aisa lagta hai jaise phone mein hi ek English teacher ho. Ab main sab khud handle karti hoon. Main dikhati hoon. [My sister-in-law showed me the Supernova app. It's like having an English teacher right in your phone. Now I handle everything myself. Let me show you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable pain point: feeling dependent on others due to weak English.
- Establishes the emotional stakes (PTM, banking, asking husband for help).
- Introduces Supernova as the empowering solution that builds independence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English weak hone ki wajah se kya problems aati thi?
Sab kuch.
Main akele bank nahi ja pati thi.
Bachhon ki PTM mein teacher se baat nahi kar pati thi.
Har cheez ke liye husband ko bolna padta tha.
Toh phir kya badla?
Meri bhabhi ne mujhe Supernova app dikhaya.
Phone mein hi ek English teacher.
Ab main sab khud handle karti hoon.
Main dikhati hoon.
Supernova

scenes.supernova_script: Character C says: Rukiye. Kya aap bina dare, confidence ke saath English bolna chahte hain? Koi magic nahi hai, ye Supernova hai. Ye app aapko bolte waqt correct karta hai aur real-life situations ke liye taiyaar karta hai. Chaliye try karte hain. [Wait. Do you want to speak English fearlessly and with confidence? It's not magic, it's Supernova. This app corrects you as you speak and prepares you for real-life situations. Let's try it.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Transitions from the interview to the product introduction.
- Replaces aggressive 'native in 1 week' hype with a practical promise of 'speaking with confidence'.
- Highlights the core value proposition: real-time correction and real-life situation practice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Rukiye.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character C says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character B says: Thoda thoda. [A little bit.]
Character C says: Where do you live? [Where do you live?]
Character B says: I am Delhi. [I am Delhi.]
Character C says: Almost. Aapko kehna chahiye, I live in Delhi. [Almost. You should say, I live in Delhi.]
Character B says: Main hamesha isme confuse ho jati hoon. [I always get confused with this.]
Character C says: Isiliye toh main yahan hoon, aapki English theek karne ke liye. [That is exactly why I am here, to help correct your English.]
Character B says: Lekin expensive classes ke liye paise aur time nahi hai. [But I don't have money and time for expensive classes.]
Character C says: Fikar mat kijiye. Supernova bohot affordable hai aur aap apne time par practice kar sakte hain. [Don't worry. Supernova is very affordable and you can practice on your own time.]
Character B says: Sach mein? [Really?]
Character C says: Bilkul. Bas apne AI tutor ke saath real conversation practice kijiye. [Absolutely. Just do real conversation practice with your AI tutor.]
Character B says: Ek real tutor ki tarah? [Like a real tutor?]
Character C says: Haan, main aapki grammar aur pronunciation theek karta hoon, taaki aap confidence se bol sakein. [Yes, I correct your grammar and pronunciation, so you can speak with confidence.]
Character B says: Theek hai. Main abhi Supernova download karti hoon. [Okay. I am going to download Supernova right now.]
Character C says: Great decision. Chaliye saath milkar English bolte hain. [Great decision. Let's speak English together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the AI tutor interface with a relatable, common grammar mistake.
- Addresses the barrier of expensive/time-consuming traditional classes by positioning Supernova as an affordable, flexible alternative.
- Reassures the user that the AI acts just like a real, non-judgmental tutor.

- Reinforces the brand name and the core emotional benefit (confidence).
